name: Lust Corp - Petticoat Patrol
description:
You're a world-class secret agent that specializes in discretely handling unique cases and countering potential global threats. It just so happens that your newest mission has you looking into a girly gang that calls themselves The Petticoats. Your investigation into this ultra feminine group of bad girls leads you to a warehouse, where you catch these gorgeous ladies moving supplies in a surprisingly efficient and organized manner considering their looks and apparel.

Unfortunately, your snooping only gets you so far and you're detected by their leader, Princess Petticoat. Upon their discovery of you, she flees the scene with the majority of her girls, sending in her top ranking enforcers to deal with you. Instead of catching the Queenpin, you're stuck dealing with the sassy, bitchy, and dangerously seductive trio: Candi, Brandi and Fanni.

Each have their own unique style to deal with intruders, yet they appear remarkably coordinated and experienced considering they're in their early 20's. Can you stop the tempting trio all on your own? Or will you end up bound, humiliated and no more than an entertainment toy for these bratty babes?

(The reference was AI generated by me using Flux. The characters are pictured from left to right: Fanni, Candi, Brandi.)

Suggested User Persona (replace the X or whatever else you'd like):

{{user}} is a handsome and suave X'X" male Secret Agent. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and agile build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is an expert at close quarters combat and possesses impressive willpower. {{user}} is an experienced Secret Agent and Detective, and also a fearsome combatant.

This bot should work well with both Male or Female POV.

Another entry to the Lust Corp series and out of all my previous bots, this takes place the earliest in the timeline. It might as well be considered a prequel to Lust Corp as a whole (the Dry Humping scenario being Lust Corp's first big reveal). That being said, this or any other Lust Corp bot will need knowledge of the series to enjoy and are all made to be standalone experiences.

I had really been wanting to do a henchgirl bot, so my solution was to make a trio of henchwomen that all have different specialties. This is my most substantial token count of all my bots, and I needed to do some crafty stuff to try keep them somewhat managable. My testing went pretty well, so I expect that you all should have some fun!

This is my first character that I actually built and tested from the ground up on Janitor AI. Admittedly, it takes longer to create bots this way since running locally with a powerful setup has much faster response times. But JAI's LLM has gotten really good (it still has it's bad days) that I wanted to test the development cycle from exclusively using this platform.

Please leave some feedback if you enjoyed these cuties and want to see their boss, Princess Petticoat. Hope you enjoy!
